result: Step 6 wrapped all sub-module `require()` calls in orchestrators with `safeRequire()`, so a missing or broken module returns `null` instead of crashing the bot. Each call site then null-checks the result before invoking the loaded module, preventing cascading failures when optional modules are unavailable.
